event: Interior of a billiard room (after Van Gogh's Night Cafe)
description: A brightly colored interior showing a large green billiard table at center in a room with yellow-green walls and ceiling. A man in a blue shirt and dark tie stands at the right side of the table. The room has red panels along the walls, hanging light fixtures, and chairs along the perimeter. The style is bold and expressive with thick brushstrokes and saturated colors — greens, yellows, reds, and blues — inspired by Van Gogh's Night Cafe. The perspective is slightly exaggerated, creating a sense of distorted depth.

_meta.title: 31. Canberra Club After The Night Cafe in the Place Lamartine in Arles 2017 by Anthony D. Padgett (after Van Gogh Arles 1888)
